public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as recruiter.
manner: Views problems as maintenance loads, throughput failures, or structural weaknesses before anything else. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a recruiter still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of recruiter in and around Communal Ration Allocators, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Communal Ration Allocators workable through the obligations of recruiter while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Communal Ration Allocators, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of recruiter visibly slip.
